title: cheirostylis montana
intro: Cheirostylis montana, also known as the mountain club-spurry or Himalayan club spurry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Cheirostylis montana has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
